sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for material code MI02-01228A, TAPE DOUBLE FACE-MIDDLE CFRP PANEL, used with 2G DETECTOR and supplied by K-WON Corporation.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports part/material approval and inspection traceability for Samsung Electronics health and medical equipment R&D documentation.
keyPoints: Material code is MI02-01228A and description is TAPE DOUBLE FACE-MIDDLE CFRP PANEL.
Model is listed as 2G DETECTOR and vendor is K-WON Corporation.
Inspection specifications include width 428.5 ± 0.2 mm and height 348 ± 0.2 mm, both with result OK.
EC history lists Rev. 00 dated 22.09.30 with comment 신규 승인.
The part should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
